message.content:
@startuml
participant "client" as client
participant "tcpclient" as tcpclient
participant "tcpserver" as tcpserver
participant "server" as server

participant "client" as client
participant "tcpclient" as tcpclient
participant "tcpserver" as tcpserver
participant "server" as server

client -- tcpclient : connect
tcpclient -- tcpserver : SYN
tcpserver -- tcpclient : SYN-SENT
tcpclient -- tcpserver : SYN, ACK
tcpserver -- tcpclient : ACK
tcpclient -- tcpserver : ESTABLISHED
tcpserver -- tcpclient : PSH, ACK
tcpclient -- tcpserver : ACK
tcpclient -- tcpserver : EPOLLIN
tcpserver -- tcpclient : read
tcpserver -- tcpclient : write
tcpclient -- tcpserver : EPOLLIN
tcpserver -- tcpclient : close
tcpclient -- tcpserver : FIN, ACK
tcpserver -- tcpclient : ACK
tcpclient -- tcpserver : CLOSE_WAIT
tcpserver -- tcpclient : FIN_WAIT2
tcpclient -- tcpserver : FIN
tcpserver -- tcpclient : ACK
tcpclient -- tcpserver : CLOSE
tcpserver -- tcpclient : TIMEWAIT
tcpclient -- tcpserver : timer 60s
tcpserver -- tcpclient : CLOSE

@enduml
